note.zh: 在隔离的裸 Qoder CLI 1.1.1 中选择 Ultimate（Default），使用仓库标准中文提示词在单次测评会话中生成，未经人工修改；runner 仅将模型写出的 index.html 按案例规范逐字节复制为 mythos-craft.html。原生系统提示正常启用，Agent、Skill、插件、MCP 与 Web Search 均关闭。Ultimate 是动态路由选择器，Qoder 未披露本次底层模型，不同案例也可能使用不同底层模型；本结果仅归因于 Qoder Ultimate。产出为「神话境界」单文件 Three.js 体素世界。
note.en: Generated in one benchmark session from the canonical Chinese prompt using Ultimate (Default) in isolated bare Qoder CLI 1.1.1, with no human edits; the runner only made a byte-identical canonical-name copy from index.html to mythos-craft.html. The native system prompt remained enabled while agents, skills, plugins, MCP, and Web Search were disabled. Ultimate is a dynamically routed selector: Qoder did not disclose the backing model for this run, and different cases may use different backing models. This result is attributed only to Qoder Ultimate. The output is a single-file Three.js voxel world titled "Mythic Realm."

note.zh: 在相同隔离配置下由 Qoder Ultimate（Default）使用仓库标准中文提示词在单次测评会话中生成，未经人工修改；runner 仅将模型写出的 pelican-bicycle.svg 按案例规范逐字节复制为 pelican-cycling.svg。原生系统提示正常启用，Agent、Skill、插件、MCP 与 Web Search 均关闭。Ultimate 为动态路由选择器，底层模型未披露且不同案例可能不同，本结果仅归因于 Qoder Ultimate。产出为海边骑自行车的鹈鹕 SVG。
note.en: Generated in one benchmark session from the canonical Chinese prompt by Qoder Ultimate (Default) under the same isolated configuration, with no human edits; the runner only made a byte-identical canonical-name copy from pelican-bicycle.svg to pelican-cycling.svg. The native system prompt remained enabled while agents, skills, plugins, MCP, and Web Search were disabled. Ultimate is dynamically routed, its backing model is undisclosed, and different cases may use different backing models; this result is attributed only to Qoder Ultimate. The output is an SVG of a pelican cycling beside the sea.

note.zh: 在相同隔离配置下由 Qoder Ultimate（Default）使用仓库标准中文提示词在单次测评会话中生成，未经人工修改。原生系统提示正常启用，Agent、Skill、插件、MCP 与 Web Search 均关闭。Ultimate 为动态路由选择器，底层模型未披露且不同案例可能不同，本结果仅归因于 Qoder Ultimate。产出为交互式 Three.js 镂空机械腕表，包含部件导览、自动旋转、爆炸视图与夜光模式。
note.en: Generated in one benchmark session from the canonical Chinese prompt by Qoder Ultimate (Default) under the same isolated configuration, with no human edits. The native system prompt remained enabled while agents, skills, plugins, MCP, and Web Search were disabled. Ultimate is dynamically routed, its backing model is undisclosed, and different cases may use different backing models; this result is attributed only to Qoder Ultimate. The output is an interactive Three.js skeleton watch with part inspection, auto-rotation, an exploded view, and lume mode.

note.zh: 在相同隔离配置下由 Qoder Ultimate（Default）使用仓库标准中文提示词在单次测评会话中生成的完整 Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Three.js 工程，源码未经人工修改；公开仓仅排除依赖目录 node_modules 与生成的 dist 构建目录，站点部署时从源码重新构建。原生系统提示正常启用，Agent、Skill、插件、MCP 与 Web Search 均关闭。Ultimate 为动态路由选择器，底层模型未披露且不同案例可能不同，本结果仅归因于 Qoder Ultimate。
note.en: A complete Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Three.js project generated in one benchmark session from the canonical Chinese prompt by Qoder Ultimate (Default) under the same isolated configuration. The source has no human edits; only the node_modules dependency directory and generated dist build directory are excluded from the public repository, and the site rebuilds it from source during deployment. The native system prompt remained enabled while agents, skills, plugins, MCP, and Web Search were disabled. Ultimate is dynamically routed, its backing model is undisclosed, and different cases may use different backing models; this result is attributed only to Qoder Ultimate.
